title: Solenangis minor
intro: Solenangis minor, also known as the dwarf Solenangis, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Asclepiadaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Solenangis minor include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Solenangis minor is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems.
taxonomy: Solenangis minor is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is a terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa.
